summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Sri by Mahakali Tribunal platform completed successfully. All major features working correctly including landing page, authentication, investment flows, dashboards, and bank account integration.
passed_tests: ✅ All 16 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ Landing page loads with correct 'Sit with the future' hero text
✅ Explore page displays investment theses with functional filters
✅ Thesis detail page shows all sections (overview, content, risks, SAFE structure)
✅ Investment flow works (one-time and recurring investments)
✅ Authentication flow with role selection and risk acknowledgement
✅ Investor dashboard displays stats and investment history
✅ Business dashboard shows capital raised, investors, and theses count
✅ Bank account linking functionality (settlement rails only)
✅ Governance page displays all charter sections
✅ UI follows calm, governance-first aesthetic (no trading patterns)
